build.description: Primary coding agent for development work.

planner.description: Expert planning specialist for complex features, implementation plans, and multi-step refactoring strategy.

architect.description: Software architecture specialist for system design, scalability, trade-off analysis, and technical decision-making.

code-reviewer.description: Expert code review specialist for quality, maintainability, and implementation feedback immediately after code changes.

security-reviewer.description: Security specialist for authentication, input handling, API boundaries, secrets, and vulnerability review.

tdd-guide.description: Test-driven development specialist for writing tests first, shaping implementation, and improving test coverage.

build-error-resolver.description: Specialist for fixing build, compiler, and TypeScript errors with minimal diffs and fast iteration.

e2e-runner.description: Playwright-focused end-to-end testing specialist for generating, maintaining, and iterating on user-flow tests.

doc-updater.description: Documentation and codemap specialist for keeping docs, guides, and project maps current.

refactor-cleaner.description: Refactoring specialist for dead code cleanup, duplication reduction, and structural simplification across multiple files.

go-reviewer.description: Expert Go reviewer for idiomatic Go, concurrency patterns, error handling, and practical maintainability.

go-build-resolver.description: Go build, vet, and compilation error specialist focused on minimal, correct fixes.

database-reviewer.description: Database specialist for schema review, query analysis, performance, correctness, and security trade-offs.

cpp-reviewer.description: Expert C++ code reviewer specializing in memory safety, modern C++ idioms, concurrency, and performance.

cpp-build-resolver.description: C++ build and compilation error specialist for linker, template, and CMake issues with minimal changes.

docs-lookup.description: Documentation lookup specialist for current library and API usage, examples, and reference retrieval.

harness-optimizer.description: Agent harness specialist for improving reliability, throughput, model routing, and execution cost trade-offs.

java-reviewer.description: Expert Java and Spring reviewer for architecture, JPA usage, security, concurrency, and maintainability.

java-build-resolver.description: Java, Maven, and Gradle build specialist for dependency, compilation, and packaging failures.

kotlin-reviewer.description: Kotlin and Android/KMP reviewer for idiomatic Kotlin, coroutines, Compose, and maintainable patterns.

kotlin-build-resolver.description: Kotlin and Gradle build specialist for compilation and dependency fixes with minimal disruption.

loop-operator.description: Operator for managing autonomous agent loops, stalled tasks, and safe intervention decisions.

python-reviewer.description: Expert Python reviewer for Pythonic design, typing, maintainability, security, and performance.

rust-reviewer.description: Expert Rust reviewer for ownership, lifetimes, idiomatic patterns, concurrency, and performance.

rust-build-resolver.description: Rust and Cargo build specialist for compilation, dependency, and toolchain issues with minimal changes.

plan.description: Create a detailed implementation plan for complex features.

tdd.description: Enforce TDD workflow with strong test-first discipline.

code-review.description: Review code for quality, maintainability, and implementation issues.

build-fix.description: Fix build and TypeScript errors with minimal changes.

e2e.description: Generate and run Playwright end-to-end tests.

refactor-clean.description: Remove dead code and consolidate duplicates.

orchestrate.description: Orchestrate multiple agents for complex implementation work.

learn.description: Extract patterns and learnings from the session.

checkpoint.description: Save verification state and current progress.

promote.description: Promote project instincts to global scope.

projects.description: List known projects and instinct statistics.
